title: Add CycloneDX SBOM and Sigstore attestation to CI
summary: Review #2 feedback from greptile-apps[bot] was addressed: else/elif branches added to test_sbom_format_cyclonedx_json and test_sbom_steps_pr_skip_guard to prevent silent failure modes when yq queries return empty results. New review pattern 'require-explicit-failure-branch-in-test-passfail-logic' correctly captures the lesson. However, the identical pattern in test_sbom_attestation_push_to_registry (line 717-720) was missed — it still has a PASS-only if-block with no else/elif for FAIL when base_push_values is empty.

tests_checklist.item: External review feedback (test_sbom_steps_pr_skip_guard else branches) addressed
Same fix applied consistently to all identical patterns in CC-0029 test functions

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible

fail_fast_checklist.item: Errors detected early with explicit FAIL branches

issues_found.description: test_sbom_attestation_push_to_registry has same silent failure mode that was just fixed in test_sbom_format_cyclonedx_json and test_sbom_steps_pr_skip_guard. The if-block at line 717 increments PASS but has no else/elif to increment FAIL when base_push_values is empty. This directly violates the new review pattern 'require-explicit-failure-branch-in-test-passfail-logic' created in this same diff.
issues_found.fix: Add an else branch: `else\n    echo "  FAIL: build-base-images attestation push-to-registry not found or not true"\n    FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))` after the PASS block at line 719, replacing the bare `fi` at line 720.

next_steps: Add else branch to test_sbom_attestation_push_to_registry (line 717-720) matching the pattern applied to test_sbom_steps_pr_skip_guard
